channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: From Microsoft to "microslop": The AI backlash that forced a reset - Digital Trends
item.description:
1. From Microsoft to "microslop": The AI backlash that forced a reset  Digital Trends
  2. Old habits die hard: Microsoft tries to limit our options, this time with AI  blog.mozilla.org
  3. Microsoft starts removing Copilot buttons from Windows 11 apps  The Verge
  4. Notepad sheds Copilot from toolbar as Microsoft gives subtlety a try  theregister.com
  5. Microsoft isn't removing Copilot from Windows 11, it's just renaming it  Neowin

item.description:

item.title: Fantastic MacBook Air with 24GB RAM at lowest ever price on Amazon right now in unmissable deal - PC Guide
item.description:

  5. Amazon Has Every Model of the M5 MacBook Air at $150 Off This Weekend  MacRumors

item.title: Introducing: The Breitling Navitimer B02 Chronograph 41 Cosmonaute Artemis II - Hodinkee
item.description:
1. Introducing: The Breitling Navitimer B02 Chronograph 41 Cosmonaute Artemis II  Hodinkee
  2. Breitling Just Dropped the Artemis II Watch 72 Hours After Splashdown  Esquire
  3. The Artemis II astronauts’ favourite Breitling now has a special mission edition  British GQ
  4. Artemis II astronauts wore top-of-the-line Omega watches around the moon — and one sported old-school NASA icon  New York Post
  5. Breitling Navitimer Cosmonaute Artemis II: The Race to Space  Revolution Watch

item.title: Lenovo raises Legion Go 2 Z2 Extreme 2TB price to $2849.99 on official store - VideoCardz.com
item.description:
1. Lenovo raises Legion Go 2 Z2 Extreme 2TB price to $2849.99 on official store  VideoCardz.com
  2. Lenovo hikes Legion Go 2 handheld gaming PC to almost $3,000 for 2 TB model — Handheld now costs more than AMD's Strix Halo devices despite relatively weaker Z2 Extreme chip  Tom's Hardware
  3. Lenovo Legion Go S (SteamOS) jumps to $1050, but Best Buy has the better one for $900  Notebookcheck
  4. The Lenovo Legion Go 2 handheld costs more than two Nvidia RTX 5080 GPUs — and that's genuinely absurd  TechRadar
  5. Call 911, Lenovo now wants nearly $3,000 for its Legion Go 2 handheld, but it might actually be discontinued  GamesRadar+

item.title: Random: Borderlands 4 Physical Switch 2 Version Apparently Surfaces In The Wild - Nintendo Life
item.description:
1. Random: Borderlands 4 Physical Switch 2 Version Apparently Surfaces In The Wild  Nintendo Life
  2. Borderlands 4 Nintendo Switch 2 copies apparently spotted in the wild despite the game being put on hold indefinitely  Nintendo Everything
  3. Physical Nintendo Switch 2 copies of Borderlands 4 circulating online  My Nintendo News
  4. A Switch 2 Copy Of Borderlands 4 Has Shown Up In The Wild  OpenCritic
  5. Borderlands 4 Switch 2 Physical Copies Spotted Out in the Wild  GameRant
